experiment: E6 Falco head-to-head (data-exfil chain), Falco 0.40.0 modern-bpf, custom per-event rules
reason: Falco's per-event model has no temporal cross-event operator: it cannot express 'read app-secret THEN connect external by the same container'. The two constituent rules each fire on a DISJOINT benign population, so neither isolates the attacker.
verdict: Falco CANNOT express the E6 chain (0 chain detections); its per-event proxies fire on 3 benign reader pods and 3 benign caller pods -- unusable as a chain detector. GCID detects the same chain at 100% with 0 FP (metrics_gate6.json).
